evidence: `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:219-246` preserves the adapter-returned `envelope.metadata.backend_used` and `envelope.metadata.model_used`; the post-invoke normalization now updates timing, attempt number, payload/raw-output references, and timestamp without rewriting backend/model identity.

Invocation-backed artifact persistence paths construct `RecordProducer::Agent` from `InvocationEnvelope.metadata` rather than configured targets at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/completion.rs:138-141`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:111-114`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:170-173`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:239-242`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:351-354`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:443-446`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:559-562`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4647-4650`.

`src/adapters/fs.rs:1105-1106` serializes the completed `ArtifactRecord` with `serde_json::to_string_pretty(artifact)` and does not transform producer fields, so `producer.backend_family` and `producer.model_id` are written through to `history/artifacts/*.json`.

Regression coverage is present at both service and persisted-artifact levels: `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:402-437` asserts adapter-reported backend/model metadata survives invocation, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:1513-1605` asserts persisted artifact JSON records envelope metadata (`codex` / `actual-model-from-envelope`) instead of configured target values.

Independent executable validation passed in this environment: `nix develop -c cargo check` succeeded, `nix develop -c cargo test --lib invoke_preserves_adapter_reported_backend_and_model_metadata` passed, `nix develop -c cargo test --lib persisted_artifacts_use_envelope_metadata_not_resolved_target` passed, and `nix develop -c cargo test --lib` passed with 86 tests passed and 0 failed.
findings_or_gaps: No acceptance defects were identified. The only diagnostics observed during validation were unrelated pre-existing unused-variable warnings for `spawned` in `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs:108`, `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs:124`, and `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs:179`.
